description: Configure the Jitsi Meet web server (~/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js) to enforce a 'Low Bandwidth Profile'. The configuration must set startAudioOnly to true and update the video constraints to a height of 360 (ideal and max) and 180 (min). Apply these changes and save a screenshot of a meeting joined in this state to /home/ga/bandwidth_test_evidence.png.
